user_prompt: Reference images are Brazil and Japan World Cup team medals/emblems. Following the same style and format, generate another World Cup team emblem for South Africa: a soccer ball combined with South Africa flag shield. The shield is the SOUTH AFRICA flag exactly: a green horizontal Y-shape (cantoned) outlined in white/gold, with a black triangle at the hoist, red band on top and blue band on bottom — the distinctive 6-color South African flag, NOT plain stripes. Centered, ~80% of frame, white background.
